label: Linear algebra

node.label: Linear algebra
node.definition: Vectors, matrices, tensor contractions, eigensystems, and linear maps form the numerical language of modern machine learning.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Linear algebra is to connect lower-level principles to downstream capabilities including Optimization theory, Numerical analysis, Dynamical systems & control theory.
examples: substrate for Dynamical systems & control theory
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting.

sentence_units.text: Vectors, matrices, tensor contractions, eigensystems, and linear maps form the numerical language of modern machine learning.
The role of Linear algebra is to connect lower-level principles to downstream capabilities including Optimization theory, Numerical analysis, Dynamical systems & control theory.
substrate for Dynamical systems & control theory
Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting.
